quoteFirst: An hour of exercise--_judō_ (jujitsu), sword play or military drill--is taken from
quoteTime: six to seven in the morning
quoteLast: and another at midday with the object of "strengthening the spirit" and "developing the character," for "our farmers must not only be honest and determined but courageous."
title: The foundations of Japan
author: Robertson Scott, J. W. (John William), 1866-1962
